honse MUGA FORFRODO Sons of Gondor! Of Rohan! My brothers. I see in your eyes the same fear that would take the heart of me. A day may come when the courage of Men fails, when we forsake our friends and break all bonds of fellowship, but it is not this day. An hour of wolves and shattered shields when the Age of Men comes crashing down, but it is not this day! This day we fight! By all that you hold dear on this good earth, I bid you stand, Men of the West! FORFRODO MUGA

it almost sounds like (from an ignorant outside interpretation) Liquid overall has a mindset, whether it’s intentional or not, “how do I succeed for myself” instead of “how do I succeed for my team” I don’t think they’re trying to be selfish at all, just they’re scared of underperforming and essentially being the one to blame for a round loss or match loss which inherently causes mental underperformance. in short terms, they’re in their own head

Yes it was a "Spoiler" but why incorporate a feature that spoils if they win or lose with !Match that tells what match is next. Like if they're about to lose, you can see what match is next in the chat and it gets spoiled. As an IT Guy myself, I would never have this feature as it ruins stuff like this. But meh it is what it is.
